title: Martin Marietta (MLM) to Report Q3 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: Inflationary pressure and supply-chain issues are likely to get reflected in Martin Marietta's (MLM) Q3 performance despite higher aggregate pricing.

title: Martin Marietta Announces Third-Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: RALEIGH, N.C., Oct. 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) will host its third-quarter 2022 earnings conference call on Wednesday, November 2, 2022 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company will release results for the quarter ended September 30, 2022, that morning before the market opens.
